name: @nimblebraininc/synapse-db-query
description: Natural-language Postgres query app with dynamic Vega-Lite visualizations

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Return tables, columns, types, and foreign keys for the connected database

tools.name: run_query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SELECT. Returns rows to the agent only — NOT visible to the user. Use for probes, inspection, and fetching the rows that will become the final answer.

tools.name: present_result
tools.description: Display a query result to the user. The only way to update the UI. Call exactly once per user question, with the final rows (and a Vega-Lite spec when the shape is visualizable).

tools.name: get_last_result
tools.description: Return the most recently presented result (for UI sync).

database_url.title: Database URL
database_url.description: Postgres connection string for a read-only role (postgresql://user:pass@host:port/db). Optional — you may instead provide DATABASE_URL via the host environment and add `allowedEnv: ["DATABASE_URL"]` to the bundle entry in workspace.json.
